title: PvP Optimized
description: The best modpack out there which focuses on improving in game FPS and your pvp experience with mods like sodium, lithium, BetterHurtCam+, etc to ensure maximum performance and pvp experience
body:
**PvP Optimized** is the ultimate Minecraft modpack designed for players who want to elevate their PvP experience while maximizing FPS performance. Dive into intense battles with enhanced responsiveness and clarity, thanks to carefully selected mods and resource packs that cater specifically to competitive gameplay.

Key Features:

- **FPS Boosting Mods:** Optimize your game’s performance with mods that reduce lag and enhance frame rates, ensuring smooth and fluid gameplay during intense PvP encounters.
 
- **Better Hurt Cam+:** Experience a refined combat feel with this mod, which enhances the visual feedback during battles, making every hit and dodge more impactful.
  
- **Low on Fire Texture Pack:** Enjoy a cleaner visual style that minimizes distractions, allowing you to focus solely on your opponents and the fight ahead.
  
- **Streamlined Interface:** Customize your HUD for quick access to essential information, helping you make split-second decisions without clutter.
  
- **Enhanced Combat Mechanics:** Explore additional features that improve weapon handling and player movement, giving you the edge you need in every duel.

Get ready to dominate the battlefield with **PvP Optimized**—where every frame counts and every fight matters!
